---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to accomplish that the tool doesn't currently let you do cleanly?

## Proposed solution

What would the ideal behaviour look like? Sketch the config option / CLI flag / new driver shape you have in mind.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you tried to solve this (wrapper scripts, external tools, etc.) and why they weren't good enough.

## Scope check

Please confirm the feature is in-scope (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../docs/CONTRIBUTING.md#scope)):

- [ ] Doesn't require a daemon, background process, or web UI.
- [ ] Doesn't rewrite the tool in another language.
- [ ] Can be implemented in pure Bash without adding a hard dependency on a new heavyweight tool.

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] I'd like to submit a PR for this.
- [ ] I'd like to help test but need someone else to implement.
- [ ] Just requesting — happy for someone else to pick it up.
